Slite is a modern knowledge base. Create: Slite is a modern knowledge base. Create, search, update, and ask questions about your team docs.
\n**Authenticate with your Slite API key:
**Authenticate with your Slite API key.**

1. Open your organization menu at the top-left of the Slite app.
2. Go to **Settings → API**.
3. Click **Create a new key** and follow the steps.
4. Copy the key (it is shown only once) and paste it here.
Asks a question in natural language and: Asks a question in natural language and returns an answer drawn from your Slite docs, with sources.
Creates a doc inside a parent doc or you: Creates a doc inside a parent doc or your private channel.
Returns the list of sub docs nested unde: Returns the list of sub docs nested under a parent doc.
Replaces the entire content and/or title: Replaces the entire content and/or title of a doc. Fields you leave blank are kept unchanged.
Sends an object to be indexed by AskX fo: Sends an object to be indexed by AskX for your custom source. Note: Slite has deprecated this endpoint.
Returns a readable doc by its ID.
Performs a keyword search across the doc: Performs a keyword search across the docs you have access to.
Updates a specific part (tile) of a doc. Fields you leave blank are kept unchanged.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: 特定のエンドポイントへのカスタム API コールを実行します。

The question to ask your Slite knowledge: The question to ask your Slite knowledge base.
Limit the answer to docs nested under th: Limit the answer to docs nested under this parent.
The title of the new doc.

How the content above is written.
Apply a template to the new doc by its I: Apply a template to the new doc by its ID.
Attributes for the parent collection, or: Attributes for the parent collection, ordered by column. Ignored if they don't match the column type.
The doc whose sub docs you want to list.
Start typing to search your docs by titl: Start typing to search your docs by title.
A new title for the doc.
New content that replaces the entire doc: New content that replaces the entire doc body.
Attributes for the parent collection, or: Attributes for the parent collection, ordered by column.

A unique identifier for this object with: A unique identifier for this object within the source.
When the object was last modified.
The redirect URL for the object.
The format to return the doc content in.
Limit results to docs nested under this: Limit results to docs nested under this parent.
How many results to return per page (1–1: How many results to return per page (1–100).
Which page of results to return (starts: Which page of results to return (starts at 0).
The block to update. In Slite, hover an: The block to update. In Slite, hover an empty line, open its menu, and choose "Copy block id".
New header text for the tile.
New Markdown content for the tile.
An external link for the tile.
An icon to display on the tile.
Text for the tile status badge.
Status badge color as a hex code, e.g. #: Status badge color as a hex code, e.g. #2F80ED.
